series_metadata.series_description: Records received by the Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO) in which complainants disclose information related to unwanted calls. Details on a complaint are logged in Unwanted Call Notification Database for review by the AGO for possible investigation. Records include, but are not limited to, initial complaint forms. These records are unrelated to Consumer Dispute Resolution Records.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years after receiving. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years after receiving., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
